nodes.label: AI as knowledge refresher for unfamiliar topics
nodes.label_negative: Reliance on own memory without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I asked the AI model to state some of the theorems related to that topic so that I could be sure I was teaching it in the correct way

nodes.label: AI as inefficient problem generator
nodes.label_negative: Self-generated problems that are faster and better
nodes.grounding_span: it took longer for me to ask the AI model to generate those problems than it would have if I had done it myself on paper

nodes.label: AI as crutch leading to knowledge gaps
nodes.grounding_span: AI can become a crutch in the classroom...causes them to have gaps in their understanding

nodes.label: AI as gap-filler for cross-subject tutoring
nodes.label_negative: Inability to assist outside expertise without AI
nodes.grounding_span: Without the AI model, I would not have been able to assist the student as well as I did

nodes.label: AI as future business tool for efficiency
nodes.label_negative: Resistance to adopting AI in business
nodes.grounding_span: I think it would make our work more efficient and provide better outcomes for our clients

nodes.label: Teaching accuracy and confidence
nodes.grounding_span: to be sure that I was teaching the topic correctly, and my understanding was accurate

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it took longer for me to ask the AI model to generate those problems than it would have if I had done it myself

nodes.label: Student learning and retention
nodes.grounding_span: causes them to have gaps in their understanding...they did not retain the information

nodes.label: Business growth and client outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: provide better outcomes for our clients

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for cross-subject help
nodes.grounding_span: Without the AI model, I would not have been able to assist the student as well as I did

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for problem generation
nodes.grounding_span: it took longer for me to ask the AI model to generate those problems than it would have if I had done it myself

nodes.label: Concern about AI causing complacency
nodes.grounding_span: I am a bit concerned that AI will cause me to become complacent

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future business tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think it would make our work more efficient and provide better outcomes for our clients

nodes.label: Independent task delegation with minimal interaction
nodes.grounding_span: Usually I will assign the AI independent tasks...I can get what I want in two or fewer turns

nodes.label: Intentional restraint to avoid over-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely use it during my job...I do actively consider the fact that my skills will become less sharp
